/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/library.dir/library_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/coverdroparea.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/user.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/itemdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/library.dir/assignbookdialog.cpp.o -o library  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
